summary: Mounted the FX Worker /ocr/* route needed by iOS TestFlight 2.2.0 (2705), added App Attest/Azure DI proxy modules and route/auth/monitoring tests, and kept the Azure OCR key out of source. Proof: focused OCR tests passed 12/12, npm run check passed 228/228 after generating 2026-06-10 artifacts, and wrangler dry-run bundled with ATTEST_KV plus AZURE_OCR_ENDPOINT; production still needs deploy/probe because live /ocr/scan currently returns route-level 404.

Deployed the OCR Worker route through GitHub Actions run 27244503863 on commit 021e913fc7ed1aa82e68538747b73e9515697593 after local wrangler deploy/secret-list hit Cloudflare auth code 10000. Live proof: /health reports release 021e913fc7ed1aa82e68538747b73e9515697593, /ocr/challenge returns 200, empty-image POST /ocr/scan with soft-fail returns 400 BAD_REQUEST instead of route-level 404, and npm run smoke:deploy is OK for 2026-06-10; next proof is a real TestFlight 2705 scan or post-fix Sentry observation.
